# NOTIFICATION API Documentation

_ERP System API_

# 🏢 ERP System - Enterprise Resource Planning

نظام تخطيط موارد المؤسسة المتكامل

## 📚 Available Modules:

| Module | Description | Group |
|--------|-------------|-------|
| 🔐 **Security** | Authentication, Users, Roles, Permissions | `1-security` |
| 📋 **Master Data** | Activities and reference data | `2-masterdata` |
| 💰 **Finance GL** | General Ledger, Journals, Posting | `3-finance-gl` |

## 🔑 Authentication:

1. Call `POST /api/auth/login` with username/password
2. Copy the `accessToken` from response
3. Click **Authorize** button (🔒) above
4. Enter token (without "Bearer" prefix)
5. Click **Authorize** → **Close**

## 📄 Pagination:
- Use `page` (0-based), `size` (default: 20, max: 100)
- Sort: `sort=field,direction` (e.g., `sort=name,asc`)

## 🔍 Advanced Search:
- POST `/search` endpoints support dynamic filters
- Operators: EQUALS, CONTAINS, GREATER_THAN, IN, etc.


API version: `1.0.0`

## Servers

- http://localhost:7272
- https://api.erp-system.com

## Authentication

- **Bearer Authentication**: bearer (JWT) — Enter JWT token from /api/auth/login (without 'Bearer' prefix)

## Common Headers

Applied globally by shared middleware — not endpoint-specific.

| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| X-Correlation-Id | string | No | Applied globally by CorrelationIdFilter — present on every request/response, not endpoint-specific. |

## API Catalog

### Notification - Inbox

| Method | Path | Summary | Doc |
|---|---|---|---|
| PUT | `/api/v1/notifications/{id}/read` | Mark notification as read | [markAsRead](endpoints/notification-inbox/markAsRead.md) |
| POST | `/api/v1/notifications/history/search` | Search notification history | [searchHistory](endpoints/notification-inbox/searchHistory.md) |
| GET | `/api/v1/notifications/unread` | Get unread notifications | [unread](endpoints/notification-inbox/unread.md) |

### Notification - Templates

| Method | Path | Summary | Doc |
|---|---|---|---|
| GET | `/api/v1/notifications/templates/{id}` | Get notification template by ID | [getById](endpoints/notification-templates/getById.md) |
| PUT | `/api/v1/notifications/templates/{id}` | Update notification template | [update](endpoints/notification-templates/update.md) |
| PUT | `/api/v1/notifications/templates/{id}/deactivate` | Deactivate notification template | [deactivate](endpoints/notification-templates/deactivate.md) |
| POST | `/api/v1/notifications/templates` | Create notification template | [create](endpoints/notification-templates/create.md) |
| POST | `/api/v1/notifications/templates/search` | Search notification templates | [search](endpoints/notification-templates/search.md) |

### Notification - Channel Config

| Method | Path | Summary | Doc |
|---|---|---|---|
| PUT | `/api/v1/notifications/channel-configs/{id}` | Update channel configuration | [update_1](endpoints/notification-channel-config/update_1.md) |
| GET | `/api/v1/notifications/channel-configs` | List channel configurations | [list](endpoints/notification-channel-config/list.md) |

### Notification - Send/Schedule

| Method | Path | Summary | Doc |
|---|---|---|---|
| POST | `/api/v1/notifications/send` | Send notification immediately | [send](endpoints/notification-send-schedule/send.md) |
| POST | `/api/v1/notifications/schedule` | Schedule a future notification | [schedule](endpoints/notification-send-schedule/schedule.md) |
